title: Breadcrumb
description: A breadcrumb shows the user's location within a hierarchical structure and provides links back to each level.
whenToUse: On pages deep within a hierarchy (3+ levels deep). To help users understand where they are and navigate back.
whenNotToUse: On top-level pages. When there is no meaningful hierarchy.
_legacyAccessibilityNotes: Wrap in <nav aria-label="Breadcrumb">. The current page uses aria-current="page" and is not a link.
